{{Quote|Great risk is necessary to defeat great evil. You know this.|Qlaern Hirf to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="The Krytos Trap" />}}
'''Qlaern Hirf''' was a [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] member of the [[Ashern]] Circle and a [[verachen]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. Hirf made contact with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Krytos virus|Krytos]] threat, alerting them to the location of deadly [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] aboard a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] around [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]. After making its way to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] aboard the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'', the verachen revealed to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] that it had a cure for the [[Krytos virus]], [[rylca]]. Being secretly taken to the [[Alderaan Biotics]] hydroponics facility on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], Hirf was allowed to mass-produce the cure for the virus securely.<ref name="The Krytos Trap" />

As a Vratix, Hirf was [[Gender/Legends|neither male nor female]], and due to the Vratix low-grade hive mind, the pronoun they/them was recommended. Referring to a Vratix as "he" or "she" was inappropriate;<ref name="The Bacta War" /> after referring to Hirf as "he," [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] was corrected by [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]], who spoke of Hirf as "it."<ref name="The Krytos Trap" />

==Behind the scenes==
Despite both of Qlaern Hirf's appearances addressing the character's pronouns, with "he" being specifically ruled out,<ref name="The Krytos Trap" /><ref name="The Bacta War" /> ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' and ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' both use "he" in their entries for the character.<ref name="Guide Third Edition">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''</ref><ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|43|Hirf, Qlaern}}</ref>
